prompt: Open the Get Info panel for a specific photo in Photos (Cmd+I). Use `cerebellum 'photos recent 1 /tmp/347-recent.txt'` to learn the name, then `cerebellum 'photos show_info "<name>" ~/Desktop/kinbench/347-confirm.txt'` (Photos AS dict has no readable info-panel state, so this is a soft-pass that opens Cmd+I and writes a confirmation file).
